packageRules.description: Marker package only — Next.js 16 stable checks for its presence to skip the legacy (TS-JS-API) build-time type check under typescript@7; it is never executed, and its near-daily dev builds would otherwise churn PRs. Remove together with the package once Next.js supports typescript@7 natively.

@radix-ui/react-slot@1.3.1 calls createContext at module scope without 'use client', crashing RSC builds (see radix-ui/primitives#3542). Drop this rule and the root package.json override once a fixed release ships.
radix-ui@1.6.5 pins the broken @radix-ui/react-slot@1.3.1 — remove together with the rule above.
